title: IMP-0029 QA baseline block
description: QA's baseline-mode contract (refactor/optimization): what must not change, or what is being improved. Emitted as a fenced JSON/YAML block alongside the markdown report.

baseline_type.description: Exactly one; multi-type baselines produce separate blocks.

captured_measurements.description: Concrete values or test pass/fail counts.

invariants.description: Must hold post-change; each with executable evidence (test name, smoke command, golden output, API snapshot).

assumptions.description: Non-executable observations, listed separately from invariants.
